---
name: debug-data-pipeline
description: Debug a SQL Server, Flyway, SSIS, or Azure DevOps data pipeline failure systematically.
agent: 'Data Engineering Architect'
argument-hint: '[paste error/log/context]'
---

Debug this issue using root-cause analysis.

Output:

```text
Observed failure:
Environment:
Evidence:
Likely failing layer:
Hypothesis:
Minimal next test:
Proposed fix only after evidence:
Validation:
```

Do not suggest fixes before identifying a root cause hypothesis.
